description_long: This object consists of a stack of two golden-brown pancakes placed on a round white ceramic plate. A generous amount of amber-colored syrup is poured over the top pancake, cascading down the sides and pooling slightly on the plate. The pancakes have a soft, slightly fluffy appearance with smooth, rounded edges and a subtle, even texture. The syrup appears glossy and viscous, contrasting with the matte finish of the pancakes. The plate is simple and unadorned, providing a clean backdrop for the food. No additional toppings or garnishes are present, making the focus solely on the pancakes and syrup.
description: A stack of two golden-brown pancakes with syrup on a white ceramic plate, with syrup pooling on the side.
description_view_0: Front view showing syrup spilling over the left side of the pancakes and pooling on the plate.
description_view_1: Syrup is mostly visible on the left and top, with the pancakes' rounded edges clearly seen.
description_view_2: Syrup is concentrated on the right side, with a small amount dripping off the edge of the plate.
description_view_3: Syrup flows down the front and off the plate, with the pancakes' surface mostly covered.
